resolveVariables ::
  forall m fragments.
  (MonadError QErr m, Traversable fragments) =>
  Options.BackwardsCompatibleNullInNonNullableVariables ->
  [G.VariableDefinition] ->
  GH.VariableValues ->
  [G.Directive G.Name] ->
  G.SelectionSet fragments G.Name ->
  m
    ( [G.Directive Variable],
      G.SelectionSet fragments Variable
    )
